title: Smetana modpack
description:
Cool client modpack
Aimed to atmosphere, has QoL mods
body:
![screenshot from modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e448fabb5345acc4e3b47d3571743eacd88592_0.webp)
## Cool client(for server) modpack

Mostly aimed at beautyful and atmosphere, also include a QoL mods.

**Some featuress:** shaders, newtexturessforr some items, litematica, world & mini map, hold my items, screenshot viewer in game, updated hud & ui, dropped items now have physics and more...

### Credits(not-modrinth projects):
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)
- Modified [Fresh textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-textures) ([allowed by the author of the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WYZar9ix/images/81452759677743b2b056ff1f8911648d8f6fcadf.jpeg))
